title: Follow live: Messi strikes from outside the box to...
summary: Messi scored from outside the box in live match coverage.

zh.title: 直播：梅西远射破门
zh.summary: 梅西在直播比赛中远距离射门破门。

title: Arsenal looked superb with Saka back. Could it be ...
summary: Bukayo Saka returned from injury to lead Arsenal to a 3-0 victory over Fulham, showcasing the form that could propel them toward a Premier League title.
content: Bukayo Saka's first start in over a month was a welcome sight and he responded in kind, leading Arsenal to a 3-0 win over Fulham with an energy that could yet help them win the Premier League this season.

zh.title: 萨卡回归，阿森纳表现无敌
zh.summary: 布卡约·萨卡伤愈复出，率领阿森纳以3:0击败富勒姆，展现出可能助其争夺英超冠军的状态。

title: Arteta: In-form Saka gives Arsenal title momentum
summary: Manager Mikel Arteta said Saka's return to peak form provides crucial momentum for Arsenal's pursuit of domestic and European glory.
content: Mikel Arteta said Bukayo Saka has returned to his best form at a crucial moment and claimed momentum is with Arsenal as they target glory at home and abroad.

zh.title: 阿尔特塔：状态火热的萨卡为阿森纳提供争冠动力
zh.summary: 阿森纳主帅米克尔·阿尔特塔表示，萨卡回到巅峰状态为阿森纳追逐国内和欧洲荣耀提供了关键动力。

title: Reynolds 'gutted' as Wrexham's PL dreams dashed
summary: Wrexham co-owner Ryan Reynolds expressed his disappointment after the club failed to secure promotion to the Premier League this season.
content: Wrexham co-owner Ryan Reynolds has said that he is "completely gutted" after Wrexham's dream of reaching the Premier League came to an end, for this season anyway, on Saturday.

zh.title: 雷诺兹为雷克瑟姆英超梦碎而"失望"
zh.summary: 雷克瑟姆共同所有人瑞恩·雷诺兹在球队本赛季未能成功升入英超后表达了失望之情。

title: Flick picks magician over Madrid with title in sig...
summary: Barcelona coach Hansi Flick will prioritize performance as his team awaits confirmation of a potential LaLiga title this weekend.
content: Barcelona coach Hansi Flick will swap Real Madrid for a magician on Sunday as he waits to find out if his team will be crowned LaLiga champions this weekend.

zh.title: 弗利克选择魔术师而非马德里争夺标题
zh.summary: 巴塞罗那主教练汉斯·弗利克将优先考虑比赛表现，因为球队等待本周末潜在西甲冠军的确认。

title: Villas-Boas tops Mourinho as Porto clinch title
summary: FC Porto, led by president Andre Villas-Boas, won the Portuguese Primeira Liga title by defeating Benfica, coached by Jose Mourinho, in a matchup between mentor and protégé.
content: The protégé got the better of his old mentor in Portugal as FC Porto, under the presidency of Andre Villas-Boas, beat Jose Mourinho-coached Benfica to the Portuguese Primeira Liga title on Saturday.

zh.title: 维拉斯-博阿斯击败穆里尼奥，波尔图赢得冠军
zh.summary: 由主席安德雷·维拉斯-博阿斯领导的波尔图足球俱乐部通过击败由何塞·穆里尼奥执教的本菲卡赢得葡萄牙超级联赛冠军，这是师徒之间的对决。

title: Dest returns from injury to boost U.S. WC hopes
summary: U.S. defender Sergiño Dest returned from hamstring injury as a substitute in PSV's draw with Ajax, providing a boost to American World Cup aspirations.
content: United States defender Sergiño Dest made his return from a hamstring injury by coming on as a substitute in PSV Eindhoven's 2-2 draw at Ajax in the Dutch league on Saturday.

zh.title: 德斯特伤愈复出 提振美国世界杯前景
zh.summary: 美国后卫德斯特因腿筋伤愈，以替补身份出场参加PSV与阿贾克斯的平局比赛，为美国世界杯前景注入希望。

title: Dzeko, 40, leads Schalke to Bundesliga promotion
summary: At age 40, striker Edin Dzeko helped lead Schalke back to the Bundesliga with a decisive victory, securing the seven-time champion's return to Germany's top tier.
content: Edin Dzeko returned in time for the celebrations as seven-time German champion Schalke sealed their return to the Bundesliga with a 1-0 win over Fortuna Düsseldorf on Saturday.

zh.title: 40岁的哲科领导沙尔克升入德甲
zh.summary: 40岁的前锋埃丁·哲科帮助沙尔克凭借决定性胜利重返德甲，这支七次德甲冠军队重返德国顶级联赛。
